full_text:
Meng Yi 孟益
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Meng Yi (孟益). Sent to aid Gongsun Zan in the failed camapign against Zhang Ju and Zhang Chun. Meng Yi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
